conceptClusters.title: Retained box, percentage, and image-purpose foundations
exitEvidence: Learner labels box and percentage reference systems before any decorative paint or transformed geometry is evaluated.
Learner keeps required image meaning and functionality in HTML when author paint, resources, or user color choices remove decoration.

conceptClusters.title: Layered background paint and image geometry
exitEvidence: Learner expands background shorthands, matches every layer list, and predicts complete front-to-back paint with a resilient base color.
Learner computes positioning, sizing, tiling, attachment, origin, and clipping across changed image and box dimensions.

conceptClusters.title: Border, radius, image, and shadow edge geometry
exitEvidence: Learner traces conventional borders, normalized corner curves, nine-slice border images, and ordered shadow paint without confusing ink with layout.
Fallback, forced-colors, focus, target, and changed-content evidence preserves every semantic boundary when decoration disappears.

conceptClusters.title: Transform composition, origins, and reference boxes
exitEvidence: Learner maps points through non-commutative transform lists and nested coordinate systems with numeric rather than screenshot-only evidence.
Learner resolves origins and percentages against explicit CSS or SVG reference boxes after changed geometry.

conceptClusters.title: Post-layout transform effects and interaction boundaries
exitEvidence: Learner separates unchanged ordinary-flow allocation from changed client, overflow, stacking, containing-block, focus, and pointer evidence.
Learner rejects transforms as layout, reading-order, or target-size repairs and proves usable keyboard-pointer parity on changed cases.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: The public-notice posting and stamp treatment accumulates source, prediction, implementation, measurement, changed-case, correction, and defense evidence.
activityDesigns.startingState: A public-notice variation supplies partial evidence but omits several paint and coordinate decisions.
activityDesigns.completionState: The notice variation completes missing implementation and defends changed paint, clipping, fallback, and transformed interaction behavior.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports observed evidence, the unmet competency, why it matters, and the smallest useful next action. First omitted decision that prevents the partial artifact from generalizing.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints reveal the next inspection or reasoning move, never canonical source, final values, or completed evidence.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure routes to one smaller causal trace, one parallel retry, and a changed reassessment while canonical answers remain server-side.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: The museum kiosk decorative-content incident report accumulates source, prediction, implementation, measurement, changed-case, correction, and defense evidence.
activityDesigns.startingState: A museum kiosk loses meaning, focus, and hit behavior when decorative resources and transforms change.
activityDesigns.completionState: The incident report proves root causes and causal repairs on parallel paint, geometry, semantic, and input failures.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports observed evidence, the unmet competency, why it matters, and the smallest useful next action. Earliest causal fault rather than the last visible symptom.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints reveal the next inspection or reasoning move, never canonical source, final values, or completed evidence.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure routes to one smaller causal trace, one parallel retry, and a changed reassessment while canonical answers remain server-side.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: The unfamiliar transit placard performance checkpoint accumulates source, prediction, implementation, measurement, changed-case, correction, and defense evidence.

activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports observed evidence, the unmet competency, why it matters, and the smallest useful next action. First competency claim unsupported by no-hint observable evidence.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Assessment hints are disabled; remediation occurs only after the scored attempt through a parallel form.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure routes to one smaller causal trace, one parallel retry, and a changed reassessment while canonical answers remain server-side.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact specifies original interaction, evidence, feedback, correction, and transfer contracts only; it is not learner-facing content, runnable starter code, or a publishable course.

gaps: Learner-facing explanations, worked calculations, source fixtures, asset-rights records, starter code, and canonical server-side checks remain unauthored.
Background image failure, forced colors, scroll attachment, border-image interoperability, and transformed hit testing require representative browser fixtures and accessibility review.
The inline editor, sandboxed preview, geometry instrumentation, persistence, hint routing, correction branches, and assessment delivery have not been flow-verified.
Subject, instructional, accessibility, responsive-flow, semantic-duplication, and representative-learner reviews remain open before approval or publication.
